title: content.ideate task payload (v1)
description: Input for the content generator's content.ideate skill — agent-led topic selection. Picks a fresh on-lane topic so the mesh can start its own work (daily loop) without a human-supplied topic. Deterministic per (lane, seed); the result feeds the topic of a generative coordinate.run.

lane.description: Editorial lane to pick within (allowed subjects/angles). Unknown values fall back to the default lane. Default: postal-logistics.

seed.description: Determinism seed. Defaults to the UTC calendar day (YYYY-MM-DD) so each day yields a different, reproducible topic. Tests pin this.

$comment: Output artifact 'ideated-topic' (application/json): { topic: string, lane: string, rationale: string, seed: string }.
